mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_OAUTH_MEMBER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_OAUTH_MEMBER VALUES ( #{id}, #{memberEmail},
#{memberPassword} NULL ,
#{memberPicture} DEFAULT , #{memberName}, #{memberNickname},
#{memberProvider} DEFAULT
)
mapper.select: SELECT ID, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PASSWORD, MEMBER_NAME FROM TBL_OAUTH_MEMBER
